preflight.note: Created before implementing deterministic dashboard validation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Dashboard generation is canonical and does not change solely because the calendar date advanced.
RepoPact validation fails when the committed dashboard is missing or differs from freshly generated output.
RepoPact mutation and repair commands regenerate the dashboard before reporting a valid repository.
Regression tests prove stale-dashboard rejection, deterministic regeneration, repair, and adopter command compatibility.
An adopter pins the upstream fix and proves its previously stale dashboard cannot pass validation.
